item.name: Magitek Predator Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your magitek predator will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Magitek Predator
mount.action: Call into battle your magitek predator, and have you some fun.
mount.description: Predator series warmachina were originally designed to improve magitek reaper killing potential via the addition of close-quarter weaponry. While the extra firepower led to a higher kill ratio, the weight it added hampered maneuverability. This unique model appears to have had its weapons removed and replaced with an experimental propulsion engine.
mount.tooltip:
I ain't got time to bleed.
- Ancient Adage
